title: PRAIRIE Institute - Prairie
cleaned_text: PR[AI]RIE has the ambitious objective of becoming a world leader in research and higher education in AI, with a real impact on the economy and society, driven by its founding members, world class academic institutions, industrial partners leading in their fields and a network of strong international partners. PR[AI]RIE is one of the 9 French AI-Clusters financed by France  for a total of 75m€ over 5 years ). Its founding academic members are CNRS, Inria, Institut Pasteur, Université PSL and Université de Paris Cité. Permanent Researchers from our partners with a proven record of excellence in AI. 80 Partner companies including GE HealthCare, Google DeepMind, Hermès, Meta, Valéo and startups. Research Our reasearch areas Research in PR[AI]RIE is organized in a double helix with two intertwined threads: (a) core AI methodological research, and (b) interdisciplinary work at the interface with sciences and applications. Autonomous agents and multi-agent systems Autonomous agents and multi-agent systems cover a wide range of techniques from games to voting theory. Various algorithms and mathematical theories are used in these domains. Biomedical image analysis plays a crucial role in life sciences and healthcare, enabling researchers and clinicians to extract valuable insights from vast amounts of visual data. Since the earliest days of Artificial Intelligence, the study of human cognition has played an important role. The very first working code presented at the Dartmouth… Computer vision is the part of AI concerned with the automated interpretation of digital imagery, with very strong links with machine learning, natural image understanding and robotics… The Data Sciences Group at PRAIRIE is a dedicated team of experts specializing in the field of machine learning and its applications in health sciences and medical imaging. The research themes of the PRAIRIE Genomics researchers coalesce around the exploration and application of machine learning in genomics, with a particular focus… Machine learning is the core algorithmic component behind recent successes in artificial intelligence, relying on training models with vast amounts of data. The Networked Data Management group comprises a dedicated team of researchers specializing in various fields, including software verification, representation learning, distributed algorithms, and large-scale data management. Double Bachelor‘s degree in Artificial Intelligence and Organizational Sciences, International Bachelor of Science in AI, CPES – Sciences data, arts & cultures. Executive master statistique et big data, Executive master intelligence artificielle et science des données, Certificat Data Sciences, Masterclasses in AI, AI in medicine and Illumens programs… The Paris School of AI of Université PSL, a key part of the PR[AI]RIE AI-Cluster, has recruited 10 AI Fellows, international researchers at the forefront of AI, who will also participate in its teaching activities. From my experiences, I would advice students who would like to work in this field to first find out research topics closest to their own studies or to their interests, then study not only fundamental courses in their major… Shuyu Dong AI Fellow Paris School of AI Université Paris Dauphine-PSL AI and neuroscience are in a virtuous loop. On one hand, even “simple” nervous systems learn quickly, adapt online, and generalise from limited experience – capabilities today’s AI still struggles to match. Vito Dichio AI Fellow Paris School of AI ENS-PSL I would also encourage students to stay curious about both theory and practice. Bayesian methods are deeply mathematical, but their power comes from being applied to real-world problems. Mélodie Monod AI Fellow Paris School of AI Université Paris Dauphine-PSL Gérer le consentement Pour offrir les meilleures expériences, nous utilisons des technologies telles que les cookies pour stocker et/ou accéder aux informations des appareils. Le fait de consentir à ces technologies nous permettra de traiter des données telles que le comportement de navigation ou les ID uniques sur ce site. Le fait de ne pas consentir ou de retirer son consentement peut avoir un effet négatif sur certaines caractéristiques et fonctions. Fonctionnel Always active Le stockage ou l’accès technique est strictement nécessaire dans la finalité d’intérêt légitime de permettre l’utilisation d’un service spécifique explicitement demandé par l’abonné ou l’utilisateur, ou dans le seul but d’effectuer la transmission d’une communication sur un réseau de communications électroniques. Préférences Le stockage ou l’accès technique est nécessaire dans la finalité d’intérêt légitime de stocker des préférences qui ne sont pas demandées par l’abonné ou l’utilisateur. Statistiques Le stockage ou l’accès technique qui est utilisé exclusivement à des fins statistiques.Le stockage ou l’accès technique qui est utilisé exclusivement dans des finalités statistiques anonymes. En l’absence d’une assignation à comparaître, d’une conformité volontaire de la part de votre fournisseur d’accès à internet ou d’enregistrements supplémentaires provenant d’une tierce partie, les informations stockées ou extraites à cette seule fin ne peuvent généralement pas être utilisées pour vous identifier. Marketing Le stockage ou l’accès technique est nécessaire pour créer des profils d’utilisateurs afin d’envoyer des publicités, ou pour suivre l’utilisateur sur un site web ou sur plusieurs sites web ayant des finalités marketing similaires.

title: 2026 Conference
cleaned_text: ICML  Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning Latest Announcements Stay updated with conference news - The Career Site is open - Future Meetings updated for  and  - To Our Reviewers: ICML  Community Standards and Support Statement - ICML  dates and location confirmed: July 6–11,  at the COEX Convention & Exhibition Center, Seoul, South Korea (July 6: Expo/Tutorial Day; July 7–9: Main Conference; July 10–11: Workshops). - The ICML  Policy for LLM use in Reviewing has been announced. - FAQ: Have a question about paper submission, review process, or policies about ICML ? Please check the ICML  Peer Review FAQ page first! - FAQ: Have a question about ICML  conference logistics (registration, visa letter of invitation, etc)? Please check the ICML Conference FAQ page first! Important Dates Key deadlines and events Exhibitors We thank our exhibitors for all their support! Exhibitor applications for ICML  are open until May, 25,  About the Conference The International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) is the premier gathering of professionals dedicated to the advancement of the branch of artificial intelligence known as machine learning. ICML is globally renowned for presenting and publishing cutting-edge research on all aspects of machine learning used in closely related areas like artificial intelligence, statistics and data science, as well as important application areas such as machine vision, computational biology, speech recognition, and robotics. ICML is one of the fastest growing artificial intelligence conferences in the world. Participants at ICML span a wide range of backgrounds, from academic and industrial researchers, to entrepreneurs and engineers, to graduate students and postdocs.

title: ECAI - 27TH European Conference on Artificial Intelligence
cleaned_text: The ECAI  multimedia repository is now available. You can access it at  LATEST NEWS ECAI- has just concluded. Our heartfelt thanks to all the people, institutions, and sponsors whose efforts helped to make it happen. We hope to see many of you in Bologna next year for ECAI-! ECAI, the European Conference on Artificial Intelligence, is Europe’s premier AI research venue. We are pleased to host the 27th edition of this conference in person, in Santiago de Compostela, a city which has been for centuries the destination of pilgrims and travellers from all over Europe. ECAI- will feature, as usual, a full programme of technical papers, as well as many AI-related events of interest to researchers, students and industry professionals. This includes workshops and tutorials, invited talks, special sessions, as well as ECAI’s sister conference on AI applications (PAIS). The conference is organised by the European Association for Artificial Intelligence (EurAI) and the Spanish Artificial Intelligence Society (AEPIA) and it is hosted by CiTIUS, the Research Centre on Intelligent Technologies of the University of Santiago de Compostela. Although the first conference to be labelled “European Conference on AI” was ECAI- held in Orsay near Paris, the European AI community has traditionally considered the first four biennial Conferences on Artificial Intelligence and Simulation of Behaviour (Brighton , Edinburgh , Hamburg  and Amsterdam ) as “European Conferences on AI.” This is why we celebrate in  in Santiago de Compostela, with the 27th ECAI, 50 years of European Conferences on AI and this is the motivation for ECAI  motto: "Celebrating the past. Inspiring the future". To find out more about the history of ECAI, please visit the EurAI website. ORGANISED BY SANTIAGO DE COMPOSTELA Welcome to Santiago de Compostela, the capital of the Autonomous Community of Galicia; declared a World Heritage City by UNESCO thanks to its monumental beauty, extraordinary conservation and as the final destination of a thousand-year-old pilgrim route: the Way of St. James, which, since the 9th century, has transformed this finis terrae into a meeting place of Western faith and thinking. VENUES GALICIA CONFERENCE AND EXHIBITION CENTRE Continuing the centuries-old Compostela tradition of hospitality and thanks to its professionalism and the quality of services it offers, the Galicia Conference and Exhibition Centre has become a national and international benchmark in the sector of organizing and hosting events.Indoor map of the Galicia Conference and Exhibition Centre: Where you can sense the history behind the 50th anniversary of ECAI. Download it here SCHOOLS OF PHILOLOGY AND COMMUNICATION SCIENCES These buildings, located in the North Campus, will host ECAI  workshops, tutorials and the doctoral consortium.Indoor map of the School of Philology: Where you can feel the spirit of the French and Portuguese Ways. Download it here Indoor map of the School of Communication Sciences: Where you can feel the spirit of the Winter, English, Northern and Fisterra Ways. Download it here GALICIA’S CITY OF CULTURE Galicia’s City of Culture rises on the top of mount Gaiás as a formidable architectural milestone for the new century. Designed by Peter Eisenman, the Museum Building will host the Conference Dinner. AUDITORIO DE GALICIA This beautiful complex, neighbouring the University's North Campus and a few steps from the Cathedral of Santiago de Compostela, will host the Welcome Reception. Organisers GENERAL CHAIR PROGRAM COMMITTEE CHAIRS ORGANIZING COMMITTEE CHAIRS DOCTORAL CONSORTIUM CHAIRS DEMO CHAIR JOURNAL TRACK CHAIR DIVERSITY AND INCLUSION CHAIRS PUBLICITY CHAIR WORKFLOW MANAGERS LUNCH WITH A EurAI FELLOW CHAIR ECAI  YEARS BUILDING THE FUTURE WITH AI Santiago de Compostela, declared a World Heritage City by UNESCO in , has been for centuries the final destination for people all over Europe through the historical Routes to Santiago de Compostela. The city was elected to host ECAI’s  edition, which finally went online because of the COVID pandemic. Despite such extraordinary circumstances, Digital ECAI was a huge success, with more than 5, attendees online. Because of this, EurAI decided that Santiago would host the  edition as well. ECAI  OCTOBER  SANTIAGO DE COMPOSTELA
